
---

> [!NOTE]
> Use this form to submit your game so it can be featured and hosted on the website.
***

## Game Submission

**Name**  
*Display name of the game*

**Slug (URL-friendly)**  
*Used for URLs, e.g., `cookie-clicker`*

**Category**  
*Adventure, Platformer, Puzzle, etc.*

**Thumbnail URL (optional)**  
*URL to preview image (min. 500x500px, 4/3 aspect ratio)*

**GitHub Repository URL**  

> [!IMPORTANT]
> *Must be hosted on GitHub, root contains `index.html`, fully playable in browser. Only submissions meeting these requirements will be accepted.*

## Notes

*Any extra info*
